data.name: Star Goddess
data.detailed_description:
You are the pilot of a small ship that is involved by chance in a war between the army of the evil goddess Mirajane and 9 beautiful demigods who want to escape their destiny.
You have to avoid lots of missiles, lasers, bullets and starships, or maybe you can set the difficulty level to “I’m here for the view”, and enjoy the visuals.
Free them by destroying her clothes!!

Features


This game is a combination of shoot 'em up and stripping game.

You will have to save the 10 demigoddes they are:

  • Saori, the sweet, friendly and innocent stewardess.
  • Mei, the confident, strong and competitive cheerleader.
  • Rei, the always responsible policewoman.
  • Yuuki, the calm and intellectual geisha.
  • Misaki, the practical and logical librarian.
  • Ami, the rebellious one.
  • Moka, carefree neko.
  • Ukyo, the nurse.
  • Kotomo, the maid.
  • And of course the evil Star Goddess Mirajane

Create your own wallpaper with your favorite Goddess!!

(or Goddesses)


The game has 3 different difficulty levels

  • Casual (I’m here for the view)
  • Normal
  • Hard (I deserve to be with them)

data.short_description: Save 9 different goddesses from the evil Star Goddess, and defeat her corrupt empire!!! In this addictive shmup you have to strip the goddesses to save them, from the waves of incoming evil ships.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 日文, 俄文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1+
  • 處理器: Celeron
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DX 10 Compatible Card
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1+
  • 處理器: I3
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DX 10 Compatible Card
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間
